task.goal: Land the spacecraft safely on the landing pad near the origin using continuous engine controls.
task.success_condition: A successful episode lands safely and reaches a total score of at least 200.
task.reward_description: The environment rewards moving toward the pad, slowing down, staying level, and leg contact. It penalizes engine use, crashes, and unsafe flight. Higher total return is better.
notes: This is a Box2D telemetry task: the policy receives the official public LunarLander state vector.
The action has two continuous values in [-1, 1]: main engine control and lateral booster control.
Fuel is unlimited, but firing engines has a reward cost, so useful policies should stabilize and land efficiently.

minimum_score.reason: Policy errors, invalid actions, evaluator failures, and workspace contract violations receive a conservative low score.

observation_meanings.name: x_position
observation_meanings.meaning: Horizontal coordinate of the lander relative to the landing pad.

observation_meanings.name: left_leg_contact
observation_meanings.meaning: 1 if the left leg is touching the ground, otherwise 0.

observation_meanings.name: right_leg_contact
observation_meanings.meaning: 1 if the right leg is touching the ground, otherwise 0.

action_meanings.name: main_engine_control
action_meanings.meaning: Main engine throttle control in [-1, 1]. Values below 0 turn the main engine off; values from 0 to 1 scale throttle from 50% to 100%.

action_meanings.name: lateral_booster_control
action_meanings.meaning: Lateral booster control in [-1, 1]. Values below -0.5 fire one side booster, values above 0.5 fire the other side booster, and values near 0 fire neither.
